category_sources: Official Enigma homepage says it is a puzzle game inspired by Oxyd and Rock'n'Roll: https://www.nongnu.org/enigma/
source_facts.description says Puzzle game inspired by Oxyd and Rock'n'Roll.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and manual use the name Enigma: https://www.nongnu.org/enigma/
docs_sources: Official manual for version 1.30 is hosted under the Enigma nongnu site.
Official search result for Enigma support identifies Documentation for Enigma 1.30 at https://www.nongnu.org/enigma/support.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Enigma-Game/Enigma; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Enigma homepage says it is inspired by Oxyd on Atari ST and Rock'n'Roll on Amiga: https://www.nongnu.org/enigma/
Official manual describes Enigma as a collection of puzzle games with hundreds of levels.
